# Queries for the SentinelImpervaWAFCloudV2Logs table

For information on using these queries in the Azure portal, see [Log Analytics tutorial](/azure/azure-monitor/logs/log-analytics-tutorial). For the REST API, see [Query](/azure/azure-monitor/logs/api/overview).

### Imperva WAF Cloud V2 Logs

Query for Imperva Cloud WAF security events

```query
SentinelImpervaWAFCloudV2Logs
| where Act == "REQ_BLOCKED"
| summarize count() by AttackName, CCode, Src
| sort by count_ desc

```
